name: xau_asia_london_range_breakout_m5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, a London-session breakout of the Asia-session range, filtered to ATR-normalized range sizes, produces positive expectancy because accumulation during low-liquidity Asia resolves directionally when London liquidity arrives.

entry_rules.long: During London window 07:00-10:00 UTC, close > AsiaHigh + 0.5*ATR(14) AND candle body >= 1.2*ATR(14) AND Asia range between 0.5*ATR and 2.0*ATR. First signal of day only.
entry_rules.short: Mirror: close < AsiaLow - 0.5*ATR(14) with same body and range filters.

regime_filter.rationale: Require moderate trending conditions and non-dead volatility; reject chop and exhausted days.

exits.stop_loss: 0.75*ATR(14) from entry, placed on opposite side of the breakout level
